Meaning:
n. 1. A great mass of ice, earth, or snow mixed with rocks sliding down a mountain.
n. 2. A great amount of something.
n. A heavy snowstorm with strong winds.

v. 1. To invite others to take part in a contest.
v. 2. To cause a person to use a lot of skill or effort.
v. 3. To question or to argue against, especially when something is unfair or unjust.
n. 1. An interesting task or problem; something that takes skill or effort.
n. 2. A call to take part in a contest.

v. 1. To get the better of.
v. 2. To defeat.
n. A deep, narrow opening in rock caused by a split or crack.
adj. Unwisely bold or daring.

v. To tempt or attract with the promise of something good.
n. 1. Something that attracts.
n. 2. Artificial bait used for fishing.

n. A temporary and usually less strong replacement.
adj. Used as a temporary replacement.
n. One who looks at things in the most positive way; a cheerful, hopeful person.
adj. Earlier; happening before.

n. 1. The path that must be followed to get to a place.
n. 2. A fixed course or area assigned to a salesperson or delivery person.
to beat or strike with a heavy, dull sound
Example: My heart began to thump when I saw her.

Meaning: to lean to one side
Example: Kate tilted her head in confusion when her friend asked her a question.

Meaning: something that is not fully understood or explainable
Example: We heard a mysterious noise outside of our tent.

Meaning: tangled, or densely packed together
Example: The dog's fur was so matted that we had to shave the dog.

Meaning: a group of things close together
Example: She dug up clumps of dirt to plant some new flowers in her garden.

Meaning: long, thin sections of plants that often twist around an object or another plant
Example: The tendrils of the plant wrapped around the fence providing a very natural look.

Meaning: a device used to attach objects to other things
Example: I bought a new coat with button and loop fastenings.

Meaning: to fly with quick, light, wing movements
Example: A butterfly was fluttering through the garden from flower to flower.

Meaning: waking a person from sleep
Example: She was just awakening from sleep.

Meaning: a curved structure made out of stone or brick and used to create an open space such as a door
Example: The ancient Romans introduced the use of arches in buildings.
